viewer.title: Graph
viewer.missing: No project selected to render a graph.

filters.truncatedBanner: Showing {shown} of {total} concepts. Narrow with search or relation filters.

nodeMenu.openFirstNoteDisabled: This concept has no source notes yet

empty.title: The graph is still empty
empty.body: Concepts will appear here automatically as notes are ingested.

errors.tooManyHops: Neighbor expansion is capped at 3 hops.
errors.forbidden: You don't have access to this project.
errors.visualizeTimeout: AI view generation timed out. Please try again.
errors.concurrent-visualize: An AI view generation is already in progress.
errors.promptTooLong: Request must be 500 characters or fewer.
errors.missingRoot: This view needs a focus concept.

views.needsRoot: This view needs a focus concept. Pick one from search or use 'Generate with AI'.
views.noConcepts: This project has no concepts yet.
views.timelineNeedsDates: No concepts have time signals yet. Concepts with dates or years will appear in the timeline.
views.timelineOmitted: {count} concepts without date signals were left out of the timeline.

cards.title: Concept cards
cards.description: Scan {count} concepts as cards, then open sources, ask, or review.

coMention.title: Shared source link
coMention.subtitle: These concepts appear in the same source.
coMention.body: This is a display-only link, not an explicit claim relation. It is created when two concepts appear together in the same note or source.
coMention.wikiSubtitle: This connection comes from an explicit wiki link between notes.
coMention.wikiBody: This connection projects a user-created or LLM-maintained wiki link into the concept graph. Open the shared sources to inspect the linked notes.
coMention.sourceSubtitle: These concepts were extracted from the same chunk or section.
coMention.sourceBody: This is a strong display link created when two concepts are grounded in the same PDF or document chunk or section.

ai.promptPlaceholder: e.g. transformer mindmap, history of deep learning timeline…
